purpose: Transform asset/platform/product opportunity scope into reusable research artifacts and requested formatter reports while controlling parent context size through stage artifacts and subagent handoffs.

artifact_layout.return_contract: Return run_artifact_root, run-manifest.json, index.md, reusable asset/platform/product directories, generated form directories, and final verification path. Do not return loose report paths or raw evidence dumps.

global_rules.parent_context_policy: Parent reads workflow manifest, scope decomposition, indexes, stage summaries, composition manifests, and final reports first. Parent expands raw evidence only to audit a disputed number or conclusion.
global_rules.subagent_output_policy: Subagents write artifacts to disk and return only artifact paths, verdicts, key numbers, blockers, volatile fields, and validation status.
global_rules.research_form_separation: Research stages create source-backed asset/platform/product artifacts. Form stages apply presentation on top and must not be the only location of material source facts.
global_rules.asset_platform_product_separation: Asset baselines, platform baselines, and product deltas are separate storage and workflow layers. Reuse or refresh baselines before researching the product delta.

stages.title: Scope decomposition and reuse plan
stages.role: Split the user request into asset baseline, platform baseline, product delta, and requested form before research starts.

parallelization.reason: The layer plan controls all downstream artifact paths and reuse decisions.

validation: reuse/refresh/create action selected for each baseline

stages.title: Asset baseline research
stages.role: Create or refresh reusable asset-only research for one token/asset.

parallelization.reason: Each asset has independent evidence collection and writes to an isolated asset research directory.

stages.skip_if: Fresh asset baseline exists and S0 marked it reuse.
subagent_context: asset scope: chain_id, token address, symbol, intended use
asset-issuer-pillar-methodology.md when issuer pillar is in scope
output directory for the specific asset

stages.title: Platform baseline research
stages.role: Create or refresh reusable platform-only research for one protocol/platform mechanism.

parallelization.reason: Each platform mechanism has independent docs/contracts and writes to an isolated platform research directory.

stages.skip_if: Fresh platform baseline exists and S0 marked it reuse.
subagent_context: platform scope: platform family, mechanism, chains
output directory for the specific platform

stages.title: Product / combination delta research
stages.role: Research the exact asset-on-platform product instance by inheriting asset and platform baselines and adding only product-specific facts.

parallelization.reason: Each product has separate vault/market/PT/pool identity and writes a separate product-delta directory.

subagent_context: product scope: product type, primary address, vault/market/PT/SY/pool/route/maturity identifiers
output directory for the product delta
validation: product delta cites inherited asset/platform artifacts

stages.title: Form/report generation
stages.role: Convert reusable research artifacts into the requested report form without creating unsupported source facts.

parallelization.reason: Each form writes to a separate form directory and declares research inputs in a composition manifest.

stages.skip_if: No report/form requested beyond research artifacts.

stages.title: PT market and economics product delta
stages.role: Identify exact Pendle PT market and quantify price, accounting asset, maturity, implied APY, liquidity, and PT-specific risks as a product-delta artifact.

parallelization.reason: Each PT market has independent market/API identity and writes a separate product-delta artifact.

subagent_context: PT scope: underlying symbol/address, maturity, chain, days label
validation: inherited asset risk separated from Pendle platform and PT-market risk

stages.title: X/social mining for risk, return, and points
stages.role: Collect X/social claims about points, yield, PT APY, depeg, redemption, queue, and stress narratives for one asset/platform/product scope.

parallelization.reason: Each social search lane is independent and should not pollute the parent context with raw X results. Hermes delegated batch execution is capped at three children in this environment.

stages.skip_if: No points, social, or market-narrative upside/risk is in scope.
subagent_context: X-search safety constraints: read-only, no X write actions, mark degraded citations
validation: material claims have handle/date/URL or citation_degraded

stages.title: X/social synthesis
stages.role: Synthesize all S4 reports into cross-scope social expectations.

parallelization.reason: This stage reasons across all social memos and should run once after S4 completes.

stages.title: Quantitative underwriting and decision memo
stages.role: Convert research artifacts into ROI/APR, points EV, expected loss, price-stability certainty, and risk-adjusted decision outputs.

parallelization.reason: This stage compares candidates, applies consistent priors, and produces a single decision surface.

stages.title: Final verification
stages.role: Run structural, terminology, workspace, and decision-surface checks before reporting completion.

parallelization.reason: Verification must observe the final artifact set after all writes.

validation: numbers present when S6 in scope
research-layer artifacts do not contain unsupported allocation conclusions
formatter artifacts are not sole source of material source facts
